root_text.an6.142:1.3: Aniccasaññā, anicce dukkhasaññā, dukkhe anattasaññā, pahānasaññā, virāgasaññā, nirodhasaññā.
root_text.an6.142:1.4: Rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime cha dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an6.142:1.1: “For insight into greed, six things should be developed.
translation_text.an6.142:1.3: The perception of impermanence, the perception of suffering in impermanence, the perception of not-self in suffering, the perception of giving up, the perception of fading away, and the perception of cessation.
translation_text.an6.142:1.4: For insight into greed, these six things should be developed.”
